diagrams.title: Midpoint Circle Algorithm Decision Process
diagrams.description: Shows how the decision parameter determines pixel selection between East and South-East positions
elements: Midpoint M between E and SE

diagrams.title: 8-way Symmetry of Circle
diagrams.description: Illustrates how one octant's points are reflected to get the full circle
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how symmetry reduces computation by factor of 8

diagrams.purpose: Follow algorithm progression and verify pixel selection decisions
